75359.subject: The Claude Code Creator Just Mapped Out How AI Will Rewrite the Future of Work 🤖
75359.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/ai-future-of-work-five-roles

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 395k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
When the creator of Claude Code [ https://substack.com/redirect/96d0b2bc-f31c-4b84-90bc-7e4b4cac44c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] tells you that “engineering, product, design, DS, etc., melt into a new kind of role,” it is worth stopping to understand exactly what he means and what to do about it.
Boris Cherny is definitely not a pundit. He is the Head of Claude Code at Anthropic [ https://substack.com/redirect/e5a8dd33-a3b4-43d5-a2b7-005d8a68fcf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and every day, he builds the tools that are reorganizing knowledge work in real time. He says he has not personally written a line of code in more than six months (dive deep into loop engineering here [ https://substack.com/redirect/f3221e70-2df2-4177-9832-0cb867fd9d8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]).
Now, in a single post, he just laid out a framework that quietly dismantles the way most people still think about their careers: the idea that you are an “engineer,” a “PM,” a “designer,” or an “analyst.” In an AI-native world, he argues, those titles are becoming lagging indicators of how work actually gets done. What replaces them is a set of five archetypes - Prototyper, Builder, Sweeper, Grower, Maintainer - that cut across every function and shift over the life of a product.
That’s why, in this guide, we’re going to decode Cherny’s exact framework, stress-test it against the hard data - productivity studies, labor-market signals, and the corporate memos rewriting workforce strategy at Klarna, Shopify, Meta, and Anthropic itself - and then turn all of it into an actionable playbook: exactly what individuals, managers, investors, and policymakers should do to win in the AI era.
The Boris Cherny framework: why job titles are “melting” into five roles
The single most valuable career insight of 2026 may have come from a short post by the person who built the tool reorganizing software work itself...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_.JKjOpvYCmiika-ebm2LM5vndgDDAMv1lKmCrVrhl-uI?

75351.subject: «Менеджер облікових записів»: Wolt – Account Manager – Eastern Slovakia

75349.subject: Re: POZVÁNKA
75349.body:
Dobrý deň,

môžeme 12.30?

S pozdravom

---

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]

Dňa 2026-07-01 18:49 Oleg Novosadov napísal(a):

> Dobry,
> 
> Dakujem pekne za pozvanku. Mohli by sme teda prist  08.07 o 12:00 ?
> 
> Dakujem
> 
> ср, 1 лип. 2026 р., 15:21 користувач BUKOVINA - MICHAELA BILÁ 
> <michaela.bila@bukovinakosice.sk> пише:
> 
>> Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,
>> 
>> rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
>> hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
>> Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
>> prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, 
>> prosím pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
>> Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne 
>> našli prienik v kalendároch?
>> Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.
>> 
>> Ďakujem!
>> S pozdravom
>> --
>> 
>> Mgr. Michaela Bilá
>> 
>> Head manager Bukovina
>> 
>> +421908 849 791
>> 
>> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]


Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk
